mapper.insert: INSERT INTO decompression_item (item_id, session_id, content, category, sort_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{itemId}, #{sessionId}, #{content}, #{category}, #{sortOrder}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT item_id, session_id, content, category, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM decompression_item WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC
